subcodes.first_line: The living waters flow forth and stream at all times from the Pen of the All-Merciful, and these are the cause of everlasting life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کوثر حیوان از قلم رحمن در کل احیان جاری و ساری است و او است سبب بقای ابدی و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @wisdom [hikmat], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
